prompt:
A compact weatherproof enclosure opened to reveal a neatly organized 200 Wh battery pack and a charge controller, with a folded 200 W solar panel leaning nearby. Thick cables with grommet pass-throughs and tidy terminals indicate a ready-to-use portable solar setup.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future off-grid aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean wiring, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the enclosure interior and key components centered for instant readability at icon scale.
